headline: HPE Positioned Highest in Execution and Furthest in Vision in 2026 Magic Quadrant™ for Enterprise Wired and Wireless LAN Infrastructure by Gartner® for Fifth Consecutive Time
summary: HOUSTON, May 20, 2026--HPE (NYSE: HPE) today announced Gartner has recognized HPE as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Enterprise Wired and Wireless LAN Infrastructure, positioning the company furthest in "Completeness of Vision" and highest for "Ability to Execute." This marks the fifth consecutive time that Gartner has placed HPE in this position, and the 20th time in a row that HPE has been in the Leaders Quadrant of this report.

This marks the fifth consecutive time that Gartner has placed HPE in this position, and the 20th time in a row that HPE has been in the Leaders Quadrant of this report.

headline: Super Micro Computer Is Up 7% Today: Is It Outperforming Other AI Server Stocks Like Dell and Hewlett Packard Enterprise?
summary: Shares of Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ:SMCI) are up 7% in mid-morning trading on Wednesday, May 20, easily outpacing the rest of the AI server group. Dell Technologies (NYSE:DELL) stock is up 3%, while Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE:HPE) shares are up 2.5%. In other words, Super Micro Computer stock is the standout AI infrastructure mover this ...
